title: Wave-2 🔴: dashboard — user-scoped scans, pagination, empty/populated/loading + axe
acceptance_criteria: Authenticated dashboard renders ONLY the seeded user's own scans (seed via db-seed.ts seedUserWithScans with the test user's userId — anonymous userId:null rows must NOT appear). Unauthenticated → redirect to /{locale}/login (middleware).
State×Display matrix: empty (no scans → empty-state UI), populated (N scans render), loading, cursor-based pagination next/prev works (not offset).
Seeds its OWN dedicated unique-email user via auth-seed.ts (T-04) + db-seed.ts (T-05) with afterAll cleanup.
dashboard.a11y.spec.ts (R3): axe on dashboard post-stable-state, scoped, WCAG A+AA, @functional, logged allow-list.

Interactive components hosted on dashboard (nav, auth-button, locale-switcher if present) asserted within this spec (D2 page-driven coverage). Single-tagged per qa-checklist.md; npm run typecheck passes; lists under playwright.
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of the userId-scoped visibility assertion
